description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 7

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F, S

You send out your Chakra, allowing you to create an invisible, immaterial 100 ft'cube' within which you can observe as though you were actually present: you can see and hear, use Spot and Listen, and your Sense Chakra ability (if you have it) is always active. This 'cube' starts anywhere within range, and can move up to 200 ft per round in any direction of your choosing. If an area is filled with a high amount of lingering or foreign Chakra that is not yours, you may not be able to enter that area.

The observations you make are all displayed through a crystal ball, upon which you must focus to properly receive the information and control the area you observe. While observing, your awareness is partially out of your body and you take a -8 penalty to Spot and Listen checks to notice anything in the vicinity of your physical body. If the technique is dismissed or disrupted, these penalties clear after one round. If the technique duration expires because it's duration is up, the penalty clears after three rounds, and you will be @Condition[fatigued]{fatigued} until you take a short rest.
